creator: frank@deze.org
text:
The port does not build on my FreeBSD 9.3 system (AMD64).

The only non-standard thing is that I use mysql for the database. Options file contains:

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for bacula-server-7.4.2
_OPTIONS_READ=bacula-server-7.4.2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=ENABLE_IPV6 MTX MYSQL NLS PGSQL PYTHON SQLITE3
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=ENABLE_IPV6
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MTX
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MYSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=NLS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PGSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PYTHON
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQLITE3


Build output:
